display_name: 兔子镜小剧场 / Rabbit Mirror Theater（挨打猫 v1.1・小小维修兔 v1.32・文生图测试版 v2D）
author: Toto
description: TEST build: fixes the shared image-generation trigger path, loads free-site images without CORS fetch, normalizes Pollinations root URLs, retries delayed mobile DOM mounting, and adds direct/custom API CORS-proxy fallback with model fetching. Disabled means zero image prompt construction and zero image requests.
